demographics.living_situation: lives alone; adult child is currently staying to help

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: This is her son calling for my mum. Her shoulders and hips are locked completely solid, she's in agony and she physically cannot lift herself out of bed. It came on over the last couple of days and this morning she can't even get to the toilet on her own.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: She's gone from a bit sore to completely stuck in bed overnight and I can't manage her on my own — I don't know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about two days ago as a dull ache, but it's got dramatically worse — today she's basically frozen
symptom_narrative.character: stiff and locked up, a deep heavy aching, like her shoulders and hips have seized
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says it's agony, the worst she's ever felt, and she can't move
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both shoulders and both hips at the same time
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst first thing in the morning and after she's been lying still
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — paracetamol did absolutely nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to move, and any attempt to get up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: she's completely wiped out, exhausted, no energy at all
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: she's had aches and a bit of stiffness on and off before but never anything like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: she can't get out of bed, needs two of us to help her sit up, and can't get to the toilet without help

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: a couple of tablets this morning

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: normally independent and lives on her own; her adult child has come to stay because she can't manage alone right now

objective_data_offered.value: 37.2 C on the thermometer we have at home
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: on video she is moving extremely slowly and stiffly, guarding her shoulders and hips, and cannot raise her arms or lift herself up from the bed
needs two people to help her sit up; hasn't been able to stand or walk to the toilet unaided since yesterday
